feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Landscape Transformation
feed.subtitle: SAP Landscape Transformation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Execute Function module With Pointer Failed
entry.content:
I'm trying to extract data from SAP CDC system with ODP connection via Azure Data factory.

When I run the azure pipeline, I'm facing below error. We checked ST22 dumps in SAP but no logs are found.

Note: reached out to Microsoft team and they said this issue is related to SAP systems. Please check and let me know if you could give any recommendations for this issue.

Error details:

Job failed due to reason: at Source 'SAPXXX': Error Message: DF-SAPODP-012 - SapOdp copy activity failure with run id: d904fd07-0a9b-4a4e-bc97-04d0a141451e, error code: 2200 and error message: ErrorCode=SapOdpOperationFailed,'Type=Microsoft.DataTransfer.Common.Shared.HybridDeliveryException,Message=Sap Odp operation 'Execute function module RODPS_REPL_ODP_PREFETCH with pointer 20230601050314.001386000' failed. Error Number: '520', error message: 'Maximum waiting time of 7.200 seconds exceeded',Source=Microsoft.DataTransfer.Runtime.SapRfcHelper,'

entry.title: Using local Excel/CSV file in SAP Data Intelligence
entry.content: I need to test my connection between SAP DI and Azure Data Lake. In order to do so can I upload a local excel/csv file from my machine? If yes, how can I test if the data is flowing through from DI to ADL, any recommended approach/best practices?

entry.title: Data returned from DB on Crystal Report is not correct
entry.content:
I have a report that was created in VB .NET that connected to Oracle. It has since been changed to SQL Server. The data source has been updated however the fields update with the incorrect data. The query returns shift, grade and net_wgt values. However the data is not getting updated correctly in the final report. The VS environment contains the .rpt file and we are loading the .rpt file via code with SQL Data. The data returned in the report is NOT correct. Is there something additional that needs to be done other than change the datasource? Do I need to change each field in the report? Here is the code that I am using:

Imports CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine

Imports CrystalDecisions.Shared

Imports System.Data.OleDb

Dim Connection As New OleDbConnection() 'OleDB dataprovider

Dim strReportPath As String

Dim cryReport As New ReportDocument

Dim CRViewerForm As New Form1

Dim StartYYMMDD As String, EndYYMMDD As String

Dim strConnection As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=SERVER;Initial Catalog=rodm;User ID=USER;Password=PWD;Persist Security Info=True"

Dim qry As String

Dim sdate As String

Connection.ConnectionString = strConnection

sdate = Today.ToShortDateString 'MM/DD/YYYY

cryReport = New Scrncoil

strReportPath = "C:\VBFiles\Reports\Reports\Scrncoil.rpt"

StartYYMMDD = "2023-06-16"

EndYYMMDD = "2023-06-16"

qry = "select shift, coil_grade, net_wgt from [rodm].[oracle_admin].coils"

qry = qry & " where Log_Date between '" + StartYYMMDD + " 07:00' and '" + EndYYMMDD + " " + Format(Now, "HH:mm")

Try

Connection.Open()

Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents()

Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents()

Catch ex As Exception

MessageBox.Show(ex.Message())

End Try

Dim DA As New OleDbDataAdapter(qry, Connection)

Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents()

Dim DS As New DataSet

Try

cryReport.Load(strReportPath)

cryReport.SetDatabaseLogon("user", "pwd", "SERVER", "db")

'cryReport.SetDataSource(DS.Tables("[rodm].[ORACLE_ADMIN].[COILS]"))

cryReport.SetDataSource(DS.Tables("COILS"))

Catch ex As Exception

MessageBox.Show(ex.Message())

End Try

cryReport.DataDefinition.FormulaFields("Bday").Text = "'" + Sdate + "'"

Stop

cryReport.ExportToDisk(ExportFormatType.Text, "\\SERVER\wwwroot\SCRNCOIL.txt")

Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents()

End

entry.title: RMS Group By in SAP Data Intelligence
entry.content:
I am creating an RMS workflow to perform ETL between S/4 and ADLS via SLT. In the RMS workflow Pproperties we have the option to group the data by Date, Hour or None ( See screenshot below) . Can someone provide more clarity on these different options and how they are different from each other. I was not able to find much documentation around this feature.

Use Case: I would like to replicate the data between S/4 and ADLS in real time but the client is fine with receiving the data in a batch mode with a daily frequency, meaning they wouldn't want the target file to be updated every time the underlying data in S/4 is updated. All the changes made in a given day can be grouped together in a target file at the end of each day ( with the respective flag for I-Insert, U-Update or D-Delete) . Is this possible and if yes, how can I go about updating the properties/tasks accordingly?

entry.title: Replication in SAP DI from S4 to ADL
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to replicate data from S4 as a source into ADL as a target via SLT in SAP Data Intelligence. The Source connection with S4 and the Target connection with ADL have been established with DI and are working successfully, however I am unable to locate the Mass Transfer ID in the Source Container ( see screenshot below). When I select the Source Container I can only see the CDS folder but no sub-folders underneath it. Ideally I was hoping to see the SLT folder along with the Mass Transfer ID

I am working through this blog for RMS replication to create the workflow: https://blogs.sap.com/2023/05/09/replicating-tables-using-slt-and-replication-flows-rms-in-sap-data-intelligence-cloud/

Are there any specific SLT configurations that I am missing here? Any additional setup/checks that I need to perform in SLT replication server to enable this ABAP connectivity?

entry.title: Issue while merging Parquet files for initial and delta load
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Has anyone successfully merged parquet files for initial and delta loads? I have several parquet files generated as a part of the initial load and would like to merge them into a single configurable file. I am using this link as a reference: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_INTELLIGENCE/97fce0b6d93e490fadec7e7021e9016e/4e79f7788dc94d4d80571914568aa570.html

However I am getting the below error when I try and do so. I am specifying the following details:

  • Same source and target connection ID which is the connection name from Connection Management
  • Source Path: This is the folder in which the initial load parquet files are located ( see below screenshot for MARA example)
  • Target Path: This is a new folder that I created within the root S4 folder to store all the merged files

entry.title: Version management NOT visible for an ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I don't see any version history or current version / TR# for some ABAPp programs, FM's, other objects...etc but they are moved to other systems. Also i see these in Prod.

Is there a reason for this?

How do i get the TR's for such programs?

Please suggest

entry.title: Replicate data BW4 to SQL using SAP SLT with DELTA in a STANDARD ADSO
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to have a DELTA functionality when replicating data from BW4 to SQL server using SAP SLT in a STANDARD ADSO? In DIRECT UPDATE there is a DELTA however delta is not working for a standard ADSO.

Any idea?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: Access Plan Calculation jobs for Cluster Table KONV is not calculating
entry.content:
Performance Options --> Initial Load options

Reading type - 4

Package size - 0

Write Behaviour - No transfer behaviour

Range on KNUMV is 900000

Filter Options on KAPPL field is v.

No of parallel jobs is 9. In LTRC No of Data transfer jobs is 11, Initial Load jobs is 10 and calculation jobs is 5.

Calculation job is not showing any statistics in the job log i.e., till how much it has accessed the records. I checked the log in SM50 and the Inserts/Updates is not increasing. Does this mean the calculation job is not fetching the records and pushing it to queue?

Please advise on how to configure Initial load for KONV table.

entry.title: SAP datasphere error - Partitioning for object failed
entry.content:
Hi,

when trying to replicate table with Load type Initial and Delta, I am getting partitioning for Object failed error. I am able to load initial load without error.

How do I resolve it.

entry.title: Embedded SLT in S4HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Does anyone experience regarding embedded SLT in S4HANA?

How long does the configuration take approx.?

Thanks

Berker

entry.title: Change Data Capture not working for tables having compatibility view .
entry.content:
Custom CDS(with CDC Capability) on top of MARD is always giving amount as Zero. We tried with Compatibility view

NSDM_E_MARD but CDC feature is not working with it. Will CDC work for tables with compatibility views ?

entry.title: Should i Require SLT License for below scenario ECC/CRM -> SLT - > SAP DI - > SNOWFLAKE
entry.content:
Can you please help me to understand if i have to obtain SLT License if i am accessing data from SAP DI and inserting it to Snowflake. Kindly please update.

 

ECC/CRM -> SLT - > SAP DI - > SNOWFLAKE ( S3 Bucket)

entry.title: ECC 6.0 trans data to HANA Cloud (if data has Currencies, internal and external codes conversion...)
entry.content:
I would like to inquire about the methods and potential challenges I might encounter when transferring data from an on-premise ERP (ECC 6.0) to SAP HANA Cloud. Here are the approaches I currently know of and the associated issues:

  1. Direct data transfer using SLT, but how would currency or date conversion be handled?
  2. Using Integration Suite, there might be limitations in transferring excessively large datasets.
  3. If migrating from ECC 6.0 to S/4, can existing RFCs or APIs be directly integrated?

I'm unsure if there are solutions to these issues or if there are better methods for integrating ECC with S/4. Your assistance in addressing these queries would be greatly appreciated.

SAP Landscape Transformation SAP HANA Cloud  SAP ERP Central Component

entry.title: SLT Job Status
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please let me know what is the difference between Released and Ready option in Job Status , while applying T code-SM37 in SLT System

 

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: process detail in SLT
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please anyone let me know how to see process details for a specific date in SLT through T code-SM50?

Rgds

Siba

entry.title: Calculating ROI while moving from SAP HCM to SuccessFactors.
entry.content:
Hello There,

We have a customer who is migrating from SAP HCM to SuccessFactors, we need to do the ROI analysis for the same. Can you name some applications/ tools which can do so.

entry.title: T-Code LTS > Landscape Transformation v2 website | all iFrames fail to display help.sap.com content
entry.content:
Dear friends,

struggling with a failure regarding 

X-FRAME-OPTIONS  and SAMEORIGIN

but I am not even sure on which side the problem is sourced. Does help.sap.com has this feature active?

I tried whitelisting with the table HTTP_WHITELIST utilized including the Handler List for the SICF service LTS also with custom IF-class to modify the header and finally I even tried utilizing T-Code UCONCOCKPIT - Unified Connectivity Cockpit with the HTTP Whitelist scenario to somehow get the help.sap.com enabled as iFrame but nothing helped.

I found quite some notes with iframe, clickjacking and whitelisting topics also addressing web dynpro but nothing which helps or has precisely mentioned LTS.

Did maybe someone else crossed this issue and somehow succeeded with this?

ANY help is much appreciated.

Kind regards 

BW

entry.title: Can we replicate data from ABAP CDS View having input parameter through SDI(Smart Data Integration)
entry.content:
I am trying to replicate data from ABAP CDS view which is having input parameter to HANA DB through SDI (Smart Data Integration). We created remote source using ABAP Adapter in SAP HANA and created virtual table on top of it.

ABAP CDS View with Input Parameter(Document Number)

 

When we do SELECT on that virtual table we get below error.

When you add the virtual table in flowgraph, the document number input parameter is not coming up.

 

 

Is it possible to replicate data from ABAP CDS View using Flowgraph? If no, what are the options to replicate the data from parameterized ABAP CDS View to SAP HANA ?

 

@GNS @GNS1 

Thank You

Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

ABAP Development  SAP HANA smart data integration SAP Landscape Transformation replication server

entry.title: How to remove a table from LTRC in an ODQ/ODP scenario
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

Could you please assist us in removing the tables from LTRC so we can retrigger them newly?

Steps performed to delete the table from LTRC:

  1. We tried to delete the table by using Expert Functions -> Delete Loaded Tables from the Configuration for the ODP Framework -> Enter table name = '/1LT/XXXXXX' and execute. It made no difference. The table is still running and calculating the access plan, even though we killed the related jobs from SLT and the source.
  2. We also tried to reset it using the program -> IUUC_REPL_RESET_OBJECT by selecting Delete components.

The above two steps did not help us drop the table from LTRC.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
